productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Weaved Strap White Flats
description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche. Upper Synthetic leather woven straps running across the midfoot to the forefoot with metallic embelishments on the toe region Toe strap for a cutomised Fit Back strap for enhanced comfort and to lock the foot in place Synthetic leather lined footbed with brand name Outsole TPU outsole with brand name on the forefoot for maximum grip Textured midfoot and slightly elavated heel for absolute traction This product may also come without the design on the outsole Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
